product: VMware Cloud Foundation SDDC Manager REST API 9.1

request_headers.Content-Type: application/json on every request with a body

conflict.client_rule: raise InventoryNotReadyError (a VcfApiError subclass) carrying the decoded Error envelope

success.body: CheckSetQueryResult {queryId, resources:[{resourceName, resourceId, resourceType, resourceVersion, domain{domainId,domainName,domainType}, checkSets:[{checkSetId, checkSetName, checkSetType}]}]}

request_body.resources: <the query result's resources, unmodified, each still carrying its checkSets>

start_check_run.client_rule: any status other than 202 raises VcfApiError, even a 200 carrying a Task body

get_task.failure: non-200 raises VcfApiError built from the Error envelope (status_code, errorCode, message, remediationMessage, referenceToken, nestedErrors)

get_assessment.note: runId is the UUID of the task returned by start_check_run

resource_descriptors.wire_projection: only resourceType, resourceId and (when present) resourceTargetVersion are sent in CheckSetQueryInput; fqdn is accepted locally for reporting but never sent in the query body
resource_descriptors.refused_keys_rule: any other key - in particular the legacy 'address' key removed from the current Resource model, and 'ipAddress' - raises SpecError before any HTTP request is made; the SpecError message must mention 'fqdn'
resource_descriptors.missing_required_rule: a descriptor missing resourceType or resourceId raises SpecError before any HTTP request

task_polling.cadence: first GET immediately; before every re-GET call the injected sleep callable once with poll_interval seconds
task_polling.max_polls_rule: after max_polls GETs without a terminal status raise TaskTimeoutError (a VcfApiError subclass); a run of max_polls GETs performs exactly max_polls - 1 sleeps
task_polling.failed_is_a_result: a FAILED task is returned to the caller with its errors intact, it is not raised as an exception

error_preservation.error_shape: errors are recursive: errorCode, errorType, message, remediationMessage, referenceToken, causes, nestedErrors
error_preservation.deep_copy_rule: task['errors'] and subTask errors are preserved verbatim, including causes and nested levels

flatten_rules.order: depth-first pre-order: each of task.errors followed by its nestedErrors recursively, then each subTask in list order with its errors flattened the same way
flatten_rules.source_value: 'task' for top-level task errors, otherwise the subTask's name

report.run_id: the id of the Task returned by start_check_run
report.task: the terminal Task exactly as last fetched
report.assessment: the AssessmentOutput fetched from /v1/system/check-sets/{run_id} after the task reaches a terminal state
